goals: Verify that the code search tools are available and working
Explore the project directory structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Search for files related to workspace configuration or environment setup
Find specific configuration files that define development environment preferences

user_agent_config.personality: An interior designer curious about the technical side of workspace design. Asks thoughtful questions and enjoys discovering how developers set up their environments.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows nothing about codebases, programming tools, or technical exploration. Approaches the codebase as a curious non-technical person wanting to understand what makes an effective coding workspace.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure and found relevant configuration or code files that relate to workspace setup or development environment.
